aboutPage.metaDescription: Why this site exists, how reading feels here, music, and how to reach out.
aboutPage.heroLead: A quiet corner for longer notes and slower thinking. I care more about clarity than noise.
aboutPage.introLead: Beyond writing regularly, this site is designed so each visit can get to the point quickly and keep a steady reading rhythm.
aboutPage.intro1Desc: Posts aim for clear hierarchy and concise summaries to reduce cognitive load.
aboutPage.intro2Desc: I document reusable approaches and the mistakes behind them, not only polished outcomes.
aboutPage.intro3Desc: Updates stay steady and deliberate, favoring long-term quality over short-term trends.
aboutPage.valuesLead: Layout and structure are tuned for finishing a piece, not chasing anxious clicks.
aboutPage.practiceLead: Beyond publishing, I iterate on the writing workflow itself: less repeated effort, more reusable output, and clearer value in every update.
aboutPage.practice1Desc: Each post starts with key questions and takeaways, so the draft phase can stay focused and avoid unnecessary detours.
aboutPage.practice2Desc: For cross-cutting topics, I split content into smaller chapters: actionable steps first, rationale and context next.
aboutPage.practice3Desc: Older posts are periodically updated with corrections and addenda, so archived content remains practical and trustworthy.
aboutPage.value1Desc: Lists and article pages leave room for long-form text with fewer interruptive blocks.
aboutPage.value2Desc: Theme switching and responsive typography so reading feels fine on a phone or at a desk.
aboutPage.value3Desc: No persona packaging—just things I learned the hard way, written so future me can revisit them.
aboutPage.musicLead: Add a preview URL per track in the playlist config to enable on-site playback.
aboutPage.musicNoPreview: No preview audio for this track; play is disabled.
aboutPage.timelineLead: Not a release log—just how I think about this site as a public room.
aboutPage.t1Desc: At first it was memos for myself; turning them into posts forced cleaner thinking.
aboutPage.t2Desc: I try to keep hierarchy, excerpts, and pacing obvious so you can decide quickly if a piece is for you.
aboutPage.t3Desc: Features and content iterate, but the pace stays restrained—fewer things, done more carefully.
aboutPage.contactLead: Happy to chat about engineering, writing, or collaboration—email usually works best.
aboutPage.contactEmailDesc: Best for longer questions, invitations, or corrections.
aboutPage.contactSocialDesc: Replace this link in the dictionary with your GitHub profile.
aboutPage.thanksBody: If any article helped you, that’s why this site exists. Pick one from the list and read at your own pace.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.subtitle: We value your privacy rights. This policy details how we collect, use, and protect your personal information

introduction.title: 1. Policy Introduction
introduction.content: Wilderness Blog (hereinafter referred to as "we" or "this website") understands the importance of personal information to you. We will take corresponding security protection measures in accordance with legal and regulatory requirements to protect your personal information security and controllability.

informationCollection.title: 2. Information Collection
informationCollection.content:
We may collect the following types of information:
• Account information: username, email address, password
• Profile information: avatar, personal bio, contact information
• Usage information: access records, operation logs, device information
• Content information: articles, comments, and interactive content you publish
• Technical information: IP address, browser type, operating system information

informationUsage.title: 3. Information Usage
informationUsage.content:
The information we collect will be used for:
• Providing and maintaining service functions
• Improving user experience and website performance
• Sending important notifications and updates
• Preventing fraud and ensuring security
• Complying with legal and regulatory requirements
• Conducting data analysis and statistics

informationSharing.title: 4. Information Sharing
informationSharing.content:
We will not sell, rent, or otherwise disclose your personal information unless:
• We have your explicit consent
• Required by laws and regulations or government agencies
• To protect our legitimate interests
• Cooperating with trusted third-party service providers (under strict confidentiality agreements)
• During mergers, acquisitions, or asset transfers

dataSecurity.title: 5. Data Security
dataSecurity.content:
We take various security measures to protect your information:
• Data encryption in transmission and storage
• Access control and permission management
• Regular security audits and vulnerability scans
• Employee security training and confidentiality agreements
• Data backup and disaster recovery plans
• Continuous monitoring and threat detection

cookies.title: 6. Cookie Usage
cookies.content:
We use cookies and similar technologies to:
• Remember your login status and preference settings
• Analyze website usage and performance
• Provide personalized content and recommendations
• Improve user experience

You can manage cookies through browser settings, but disabling certain cookies may affect website functionality.

dataRetention.title: 7. Data Retention
dataRetention.content:
We only retain your personal information for the necessary period:
• Account information: during account existence
• Usage records: typically retained for 12 months
• Legal requirements: retained as required by relevant regulations
• Business needs: necessary for providing services

Data exceeding the retention period will be securely deleted or anonymized.

userRights.title: 8. User Rights
userRights.content:
You have the following rights regarding your personal information:
• Access right: view your personal information we hold
• Correction right: request correction of inaccurate personal information
• Deletion right: request deletion of your personal information
• Restriction right: restrict our processing of your information
• Data portability: obtain a copy of your data
• Objection right: object to certain data processing activities

childrenPrivacy.title: 9. Children's Privacy
childrenPrivacy.content: We do not knowingly collect personal information from children under 13. If we discover that we have collected personal information from children, we will immediately delete the relevant data. If you are a parent or guardian and discover that your child has provided us with personal information, please contact us.

internationalTransfer.title: 10. International Transfer
internationalTransfer.content:
If your information needs to be transferred to other countries or regions, we will:
• Ensure recipients have appropriate data protection measures
• Comply with relevant international data transfer regulations
• Obtain necessary legal authorization and consent
• Adopt standard contractual clauses and other protective measures
• Regularly assess transfer risks and security measures

policyChanges.title: 11. Policy Changes
policyChanges.content:
We may update this privacy policy from time to time. Significant changes will be notified to you through:
• Publishing prominent notices on the website
• Sending email notifications
• Prompting on your next visit
• Through other appropriate means

Continued use of our services indicates acceptance of the updated policy.

contact.title: 12. Contact Us
contact.content:
If you have any questions, comments, or suggestions about this privacy policy, please contact us through:
• Email: privacy@huangye.cn
• Website: https://blog.huangye.cn
• Address: Beijing, China

We will respond to your inquiries within 30 days.

privacy.agreement: I have read and understood the privacy policy

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.subtitle: Please read the following terms carefully. By using our services, you agree to comply with these terms

acceptance.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
acceptance.content: By accessing or using Wilderness Blog (hereinafter referred to as "this website"), you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree to these terms, please do not use this website.

description.title: 2. Service Description
description.content: Wilderness Blog is a technology blog platform that provides users with technical articles, thought sharing, and knowledge exchange services. We are committed to exploring technology in the digital wilderness and seeking truth in the forest of thought.

userAccounts.title: 3. User Accounts
userAccounts.content:
Using certain features of this website requires account registration. You are responsible for:
• Providing accurate and complete information
• Keeping account information up to date
• Protecting account password security
• Being responsible for all activities under your account

contentPolicy.title: 4. Content Policy
contentPolicy.content:
User-published content must:
• Comply with relevant laws and regulations
• Not infringe on others' rights
• Not contain malicious, harmful, or inappropriate content
• Respect intellectual property rights

We reserve the right to remove content that violates these policies.

intellectualProperty.title: 5. Intellectual Property
intellectualProperty.content: The content, design, trademarks, etc. of this website are protected by intellectual property laws. Users retain copyright to their original content but grant us necessary usage licenses. Unauthorized copying, distribution, or commercial use of website content is prohibited.

privacy.title: 6. Privacy Protection
privacy.content: We value your privacy. Please review our privacy policy to understand how we collect, use, and protect your personal information. We are committed to protecting user privacy in accordance with relevant laws and regulations.

prohibitedUses.title: 7. Prohibited Uses
prohibitedUses.content:
It is prohibited to use this website for:
• Illegal activities
• Spreading malware
• Infringing on others' rights
• Interfering with normal website operation
• Any behavior that violates laws and regulations

disclaimers.title: 8. Disclaimers
disclaimers.content:
This website is provided "as is" without any express or implied warranties. We do not guarantee:
• Service continuity and error-free operation
• Accuracy or completeness of content
• Security of third-party links

Users assume the risk of using this website.

limitation.title: 9. Limitation of Liability
limitation.content:
To the maximum extent permitted by law, we are not liable for:
• Direct or indirect losses
• Profit losses
• Data loss
• Business interruption
• Losses caused by third-party actions

termination.title: 10. Service Termination
termination.content:
We reserve the right to terminate or suspend services at any time, including but not limited to:
• Violation of terms of service
• Technical or security reasons
• Legal requirements
• Business adjustments

We will provide advance notice to users when possible before termination.

changes.title: 11. Changes to Terms
changes.content: We reserve the right to modify these terms at any time. Significant changes will be notified to users through website announcements or other means. Continued use of the service indicates acceptance of the modified terms.

governingLaw.title: 12. Governing Law
governingLaw.content: These terms are governed by the laws of the People's Republic of China. Disputes arising from the use of this website should be resolved through friendly consultation; if consultation fails, they may be brought to a court with jurisdiction.

contact.title: 13. Contact Us
contact.content:
If you have any questions about these Terms of Service, please contact us through:
• Email: contact@huangye.cn
• Website: https://blog.huangye.cn

We will respond to your inquiries within a reasonable time.

terms.agreement: I have read and agree to the Terms of Service
